title: Chronological Ascetics of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Chronological Ascetics of Evangelion             Quote Post by Yakato » Tue Feb 07, 2012 5:28 pm ^ _ _ Sounds fancy dosent it? Hi! I've been exposed to Eva for nearly a year now and decided its time to expand my horizons join. So I joined Evageeks. (Although my key motive for joining is because - its extremely difficult to have a decent conversation about Eva face-to-face. Not to mention that most Eva fans are hard to identify or are recessive hobbits.) Now I get hung up on the ascetics of things... probably more than is healthy. Here are some questions I've been unable to answer on my own: 1.In EoE, after Shinji rejects instrumentality, why does Unit-01 pop-out of Rei/Lilith left eye? is there any symbolic significance? Maybe it was just the most convenient and provided an interesting effect. 2. The infected Unit-03 activates and then explodes. What caused the explosion? Did the angel cause this explosion as a result of 03 activating or was it just a result of the Eva breaking out of the test site? *Misato voice: Or was it there some-kind of N2 reactor underneath the test site.. that Seele didn't want us to know about* anyways, this is my first time EVER posting on a forum! So, I hope to generate a better understanding of Eva for all! (myself included) .......ah I just love thetrics

[]: Re: Chronological Ascetics of Evangelion             Quote Post by Na7e » Wed Feb 08, 2012 2:52 am Yakato wrote: 1.In EoE, after Shinji rejects instrumentality, why does Unit-01 pop-out of Rei/Lilith left eye? is there any symbolic significance? Maybe it was just the most convenient and provided an interesting effect.

[]: Re: Chronological Ascetics of Evangelion             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Feb 08, 2012 9:41 am Yakato wrote: 1.In EoE, after Shinji rejects instrumentality, why does Unit-01 pop-out of Rei/Lilith left eye? is there any symbolic significance? Maybe it was just the most convenient and provided an interesting effect.

[]: Re: Chronological Ascetics of Evangelion             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Feb 08, 2012 9:55 am Yakato wrote: 1.In EoE, after Shinji rejects instrumentality, why does Unit-01 pop-out of Rei/Lilith left eye? is there any symbolic significance?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Feb 08, 2012 11:30 am I can't figure out how you're using the word "ascetics".

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Wed Feb 08, 2012 1:38 pm NAveryW wrote: I can't figure out how you're using the word "ascetics".

[]:             Quote Post by BulletShoot » Sat Feb 11, 2012 4:10 pm On the subject of the Eye of Lilith regardless of any symbolism that may or may not be there. I think the real reason for that scene is Anno's seaming attraction to things that are beastly, surreal and disturbing all at once (plus the possibilities to cater to bizarre fetishes is also important).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 11, 2012 5:47 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: Whenever Rei is seen bandaged, her left eye is covered with a large bandage.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Feb 11, 2012 6:21 pm Probably, they just wanted EVA 01 to exit Lillith's body in the grossest way possible. Eyes being destroyed has always been a special kind of squick...

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Feb 11, 2012 7:19 pm Maybe it's to do with that saying 'The eye is the window to the soul'? I mean, he more or less was absorbed into Lillith's soul at that point, so breaking out of the eye would make symbolic sense if that's what Anno intended. Reichu wrote: Left eye is Asuka. Right eye is Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 11, 2012 8:40 pm liquidus118 wrote: I never knew that. Where is it used in the show? Besides bandaged eyes in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Feb 11, 2012 8:45 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: http://wiki.evageeks.org/FGC:Episode_03_Cut_121 Asuka's bandages of course, are EoE: http://evacommentary.org/episode-m26/episode-m26-scene12.html#cut464

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 11, 2012 9:29 pm liquidus118 wrote: I'm guessing it's used as another way of showing Rei and Asuka as opposites? Though that's for another thread I suppose.

Here are some questions I've been unable to answer on my own: 1.In EoE, after Shinji rejects instrumentality, why does Unit-01 pop-out of Rei/Lilith left eye? is there any symbolic significance?
